channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nintendo Indie World live build-up: key details ahead of the Switch and Switch 2 game showcase
item.description: Our live coverage of the March 2026 Nintendo Indie World showcase.

item.title: Huawei debuts its Atlas 950 AI SuperPoD at MWC 2026, taking the AI data center fight to Nvidia and AMD
item.description: Atlas 950 AI SuperPoD goes global as Huawei challenges Nvidia and AMD in data center computing.

item.title: We’ve Got Terrible News for the Dozen People Who Love ‘The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor’
item.description: Radio Silence, who are directing the new Brendan Fraser and Rachel Weisz 'Mummy,' reveal whether the third film is canon or not.

item.title: Bethesda’s Xbox-exclusive Starfield may have finally received a PS5 launch date according to a reliable industry leaker
item.description: A new leak suggests Bethesda's Starfield may finally have a PlayStation 5 release date following long-running rumors.

item.title: 'The missing link between still photography and motion picture photography’ – Jeff Bridges loves the Widelux panoramic film camera so much, he just revived it
item.description: Bridging the gap: A-list actor Jeff Bridges reveals the first two production cameras of his resurrected WideluxX panoramic camera line with a rotating lens

item.title: Paris Londres en vingt minutes, l’hyperloop européen relance le rêve des transports du futur
item.description: Relier les grandes capitales européennes en un clin d'oeil n'est peut-être plus une simple utopie. Dans le nord des Pays-Bas, un centre d'essais teste actuellement des capsules en lévitation capables de pulvériser tous les records de vitesse terrestre.

item.title: Charlie Brown now works for Sony
item.description: Sony Music Entertainment Japan and Sony Pictures Entertainment now officially own 80 percent of the Peanuts franchise. The companies have closed the deal, which was officially announced in December 2025 when it was still subject to regulatory approvals, for $460 million. Sony Music Japan has owned 39 percent of Peanuts since 2018, so the Sony subsidiaries are essentially buying 41 percent of the franchise from Canadian firm WildBrain with this transaction. Now that the acquisition is done, Peanuts is officially a consolidated Sony subsidiary. The Peanuts universe started as comic strips by Cha...

item.title: Amazon promises 'seven days of epic savings' in its upcoming Spring Deal Days sale later this month — I've found the 17 best early deals
item.description: Amazon UK has announced that its Spring Deal Days sale will start later this month — here's everything you need to know and our pick of the best early deals worth shopping now.

item.title: If this cheaper Sonos Era 100 leak is true, I think it’ll be the king of wireless speakers
item.description: The Sonos Era 100 already got cheaper, and if this new model cuts the price further, it'll be the default wireless speaker.

item.title: Astronomers Estimated the Lifespan of Alien Civilizations, and It’s Not Looking Good for Us
item.description: Our search for extraterrestrial life has turned up empty, perhaps because technologically advanced civilizations are doomed to fail.

item.title: Voici comment Microsoft peut sauvegarder automatiquement vos exploits en jeu sur console portable
item.description: Les équipes de Microsoft testent une nouvelle option pour permettre à leur console portable d’enregistrer les meilleurs moments d’une session de jeu sans que l’utilisateur ait à lever le doigt de sa manette.

item.title: I tested the Beelink ME Pro - a neat mini PC and NAS combination, making an ideal mass storage solution for any small business or home office
item.description: A clever compact hybrid machine that blends the mini PC format with a fully configurable NAS system. Ultimately, this makes it easy to understand for those without IT experience and ensures it will fit most homes and small offices.

item.title: What was it like the last time the U.S. hosted the World Cup? ‘Men in Blazers’ creator Roger Bennett recalls his experience
item.description: In an excerpt from his new book, ‘We Are the World (Cup),’ the popular soccer commentator re-lives his first American World Cup—and his simultaneous move to the U.S. Roger Bennett is the witty and charismatic co-host of the popular “Men in Blazers” soccer media network. Born in Liverpool, England, he moved to the United States and has since helped popularize the sport in this country through podcasts, television shows, and books, including his best-selling memoir Reborn in the USA. His new book, WE ARE THE WORLD (CUP), is a personal history of what he calls “the world’s greatest sporting event...

item.title: The Best Ergonomic Keyboard I've Tried (and Other Comfortable Typing Options)
item.description: I've tested a ton of keyboard options to make your typing life easier, and a couple I’d avoid.

item.title: The candidate that Silicon Valley built is now the one they want to tear down
item.description: Ethan Agarwal, a 40-year-old tech entrepreneur with no political background, told TechCrunch on Monday evening that he is running for California's 17th congressional district.

item.title: This new phishing campaign uses a fake Google Account security page to steal passcodes and more
item.description: Hackers don't need an app to steal login credentials anymore - a PWA will do.

item.title: The Morning After: Apple’s big week starts with the iPhone 17e
item.description: We’re at the start of another one of those weeks where Apple announces one or two of its lesser products each day. The first pair to break cover is the iPhone 17e and iPad Air M4, with more due to drop as the calendar rolls forward. The iPhone 17e is by far the more interesting gadget, especially as the price remained the same as for the iPhone 16e. Apple is charging $599 for the 17e, even though the base model storage has doubled to a very welcome 256GB. The 17e also gains several features that were held back from the equivalent budget handset last year. The most notable is perhaps the additi...

item.title: -50 % pour cet adaptateur secteur de 67 W capable de charger deux appareils simultanément
item.description: Le Belkin SmartProtect est un chargeur pratique puisqu'il possède deux ports USB-C et peut délivrer une puissance totale de 67 W. Chez Amazon, il est actuellement vendu pour 19,99 euros.

item.title: IKEA's new motion-activated light 'can be installed anywhere' — and it doesn't need a hub
item.description: The Ankarlägg is battery-operated, has a self-adhesive mount, and doesn't need a pricey smart home hub.

item.title: Livebox Store : la révolution d’Orange qui va transformer votre connexion à la maison
item.description: Orange présente le Livebox Store, un magasin d'applications intégré à la Livebox, prévu pour un déploiement en France d'ici quelques années. Le projet repose sur un système d'exploitation open source basé sur Linux, permettant un accès facilité aux développeurs tiers. L'installation en local d'apps développées par des entreprises comme Bit Defender et EDF visent à enrichir les fonctionnalités de la box tout en garantissant la gestion locale des données utilisateurs....

item.title: The Oscal Marine 3 breaks the rugged smartphone mold - it's slim, lightweight and stylish, but I can't ignore that slow processing power
item.description: The slimline, rugged 4G smartphone is fully waterproof and drop-proof, with a decent loudspeaker and long battery life, making it an ideal option for anyone working outside. With AI apps, there’s plenty on offer for anyone who wants a solid smartphone without any real frills or demands from higher specs.

item.title: Meta starts testing its AI shopping assistant
item.description: Meta has started rolling out an experimental AI shopping tool to some users in the US, according to Bloomberg. At the moment, it’s reportedly only showing up on desktop browsers when select users visit Meta AI on the web. They’ll know if they have access to the feature if they see the “Shopping research” button inside the query text box. The company has confirmed that it was testing the feature, Bloomberg said, but it didn’t say when a wider release will happen. When users ask for product suggestions, the chatbot will show them a carousel with product images and their pricing, along with a lin...

item.title: The ‘Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Star Behind Tanselle Hits Back at Lame Racist Complaints
item.description: Tanzyn Crawford didn't let any casting criticism bother her: 'I'm employed—and I'm following my dreams.'

item.title: 'It just looked opportunistic and sloppy': Sam Altman regrets rushed defense deal as ChatGPT uninstalls surge by 295%
item.description: AI ethics and military use have been dominating the headlines in recent days, and there's no sign of it stopping.

item.title: How to Monitor Your Blood Pressure at Home (2026)
item.description: There have never been so many ways to check for hypertension. Here’s what's available and how to use them.

item.title: How to watch NCIS season 23 — stream the return after midseason hiatus
item.description: Bishop's return has emotional consequences for the team, especially old flame Torres. Here's how to watch NCIS season 23, part 2 online and from anywhere.

item.title: Young Sherlock vs Young Sheldon? Yes, the new Prime Video show does get confused for Big Bang Theory spinoff, according to its creator — 'I can tell you a funny story about that'
item.description: If you're anything like me, you've already got confused between Young Sherlock and Young Sheldon. But according to the former's creator, you're not the only one.

item.title: This Berkeley building can snap back into place after a major earthquake
item.description: The visible seismic system at UC Berkeley’s Grimes Engineering Center safeguards the building and turns it into a teaching tool for earthquake-safe design. Zig-zagging around the glass-and-steel perimeter of the UC Berkeley Grimes Engineering Center, 36 thin metal rods could be what it takes to prevent the building’s total destruction.

item.title: AMD's new Ryzen desktop CPUs are all about AI with a powerful NPU for exclusive Copilot+ features — but will anyone care?
item.description: Want a Copilot+ desktop PC? What do you mean, no? AMD just revealed Ryzen AI 400 CPUs over at MWC 2026.

item.title: Samsung vs Amazon: which retailer has the best unlocked Galaxy S26 preorder deal right now?
item.description: Looking for an unlocked Galaxy S26 series device? These two retailers are clearly the best options right now — for different reasons, however.

item.title: « Ce n’est plus un secret » : Xiaomi prépare son offensive électrique en Europe avec cette équipe d’experts de la voiture traditionnelle
item.description: Avant de juger la Xiaomi Vision GT comme un simple DLC pour Gran Turismo, regardez qui est aux commandes. Des pointures de l'industrie, une philosophie de design "humaine" et un studio basé en Allemagne. Xiaomi ne joue pas, ils préparent leur arrivée sur nos routes. On a interviewé les créateurs du projet.

item.title: Quatre fois plus rapide que la fibre : voici comment profiter du XGS-PON chez Bouygues Telecom [Sponso]
item.description: Jusqu’à 10 Gb/s en débit montant et descendant : découvrez comment la technologie de fibre XGS-PON permet de multiplier par quatre la vitesse de nos connexions internet.

item.title: « La pente est raide » : Elon Musk pointe la crise silencieuse qui frappe Tesla et BYD
item.description: BYD et Tesla ne sont pas en grande forme, comme le prouvent de récents chiffres et graphiques. Certains concurrents, comme Geely qui arrive en France, en profitent pour tenter de voler la place des leaders. Mais n'est-on pas finalement en train d'assister à un retournement du marché de l'automobile, à l'issue incertaine ?

item.title: I tested the super affordable Canon RF 45mm F1.2 STM — it's a 'beautiful mess of a lens' that I can't help but love
item.description: The Canon RF 45mm F1.2 STM impresses with its super-wide aperture and affordable price - this lens has its issues, however.

item.title: How Palantir, Microsoft, Amazon, and Google Power Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
item.description: A WIRED analysis shows that ICE and CBP have collectively spent at least $515 million on products from Microsoft, Amazon, Google, and Palantir in the last few years alone.

item.title: Une faille touche plus de 200 puces Qualcomm : votre smartphone Android est peut-être en danger
item.description: Google vient de déployer son premier patch de sécurité Android de 2026. Cette mise à jour massive colmate 129 failles, dont dix jugées critiques, et une vulnérabilité « zero day » dans un composant d’affichage Qualcomm. Exploitée par des pirates, elle met en danger des millions de smartphones.

item.title: Google Home's latest feature is Gemini-powered 'Live Search' for cameras
item.description: Google Home has some significant new quality-of-life updates and a new AI-powered feature, the division's head honcho Anish Katturkan announced on X. Many of them, including a function called "Live Search," are powered by the company's Gemini for Home service launched in October 2025 as the official replacement for Google Assistant on smart devices. "We launched Gemini for Home in Early Access specifically to learn from real-world usage," Katturkaran said. "With millions of you now testing and shaping this experience every day, we're pushing regular voice improvements to address your feedback....

item.title: Anycubic déstocke son imprimante 3D Kobra S1 Combo à moins de 400 €, une bonne rivale à la Bambu Lab P1S
item.description: Que vous vous lanciez dans l'impression 3D ou que vous soyez déjà bien rôdé, l'Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo passe de 749 euros à 399 euros sur le site officiel de la marque, un bon prix pour du matériel de qualité.

item.title: Jon Stewart analyses Trumps Iran war announcement
item.description: Jon Stewart has broken down Trump's announcement of "major combat operations" in Iran.

item.title: Leon S. Kennedy is hiding a huge secret in Resident Evil Requiem, but you'll need to beat the game first to figure it out
item.description: Capcom has hidden a pretty huge secret about Leon S. Kennedy in Resident Evil Requiem that will only be discovered when players reach the endgame.

item.title: Moins de 1 000 € : le nouveau vélo électrique Intersport Nakamura Crossover E a tout pour séduire
item.description: Avec son prix plancher de 999 euros, le Nakamura Crossover E est incontestablement l’un des plus alléchants vélos électriques urbains d’Intersport, avec un style moderne et une ambition sur le confort de conduite.

item.title: Everyone is talking about the Galaxy S26 Ultra Privacy Display — but there’s one major problem
item.description: Samsung's Privacy Display tech is slick, but could be a social hand grenade in flagship phone form.

item.title: Stripe wants to help your business claim back all those AI costs
item.description: Stripe wants AI startups to easily apply a percentage markup on top of real-time token pricing to stay in the positive.

item.title: BYD va frapper (très) fort pour stopper la chute des ventes avec ces nouvelles voitures électriques : 1 000 km d’autonomie et charge en 10 minutes
item.description: Depuis plusieurs mois, BYD subit une baisse de ses ventes. Le géant chinois ne reste pas les bras croisés et prépare une véritable offensive prévue le 5 mars, incluant de nouvelles voitures électriques et une nouvelle génération de bornes à 1 500 kW, capable de recharger une voiture électrique en moins de 10 minutes.

item.title: Why cutting leadership development now will cost you later
item.description: The most successful organizations don’t pull back on teaching leadership skills, even when under pressure. They build it into their processes. Jane, chief commercial officer at a global professional services firm, watched issues that once stayed contained begin to climb the chain of command. As the issues grew, senior leaders were increasingly pulled into operational mishaps....

item.title: iPhone 17e : Apple double le stockage pour le même prix, découvrez les nouveautés en vidéo
item.description: Avec l'iPhone 17e, Apple tente d'améliorer le rapport qualité-prix de son modèle le plus abordable en doublant le stockage de base sans toucher au tarif. Ces ajustements stratégiques cachent pourtant quelques compromis techniques persistants que nous détaillons dans notre vidéo dédiée.

item.title: Agentic AI is the future of sales: here’s how to get it right
item.description: Your ability to master the technology will determine your success. Sales has historically been a true proving ground for new technological breakthroughs. CRM systems, predictive analytics, tools that promise better targeting, faster follow-up, and higher close rates have to be proven, or shown to be false in the realm of sales.
